prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have real-time access to market data, nor do I possess the ability to predict future stock prices with accuracy. Stock market movements are influenced by a myriad of complex and unpredictable factors. The point estimate provided assumes the price will remain unchanged from its current value, as this is the most neutral prediction without any basis for directional movement. The confidence intervals are illustrative and arbitrarily set around this point estimate, widening with higher confidence levels to reflect increasing uncertainty. These predictions are not based on any financial model, historical data analysis, or market indicators and should not be used for investment decisions.
